raw_consumer_statement: I booked a XXXX ( XXXX XXXX 2024 ) stay at the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX through American Express XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX On the day of departure, I got a message from the airlines ( XXXX ) that my flight had been cancelled and was told that they could book me on a flight the following day ( XX/XX/XXXX ). I immediately reached out to American Express XXXX XXXX  and asked them to reach out to the hotel to ask if I could check in a day later and was told that the hotel would not allow me to check in a day later. As a result, I had to cancel my trip. I reached out to the both American Express and the hotel to request a refund for the {$2200.00} I paid for the XXXX XXXX. The hotel indicated that I would have to request a refund from American Express XXXX XXXX XXXX because they were the third party who received the funds for the hotel stay. When I reached out to American Express XXXX XXXX to request a refund, I was told that they did an investigation and that they are not able to refund me because no refunds were permitted after XX/XX/XXXX. I booked my hotel using American Express XXXX XXXX to have a level of assurance that I thought American Express offered to its XXXX cardholders. At the end of the day, American Express lost nothing in this transaction and I am out of {$2200.00}.
